name: lessons-inject-compression
doc: SessionStart (scope lessons) injects MEMORY/LESSON.md through the real CLI with Stage-2 compression: the newest RECENT_FULL (10) bullets pass verbatim, every older bullet collapses to the rule after its last '→'. $TMP carries a package.json marker so projectRootOrNull resolves to $TMP, and a 16-bullet LESSON.md so bullets 11–16 (indices 10–15) are compressed; the assertion targets the 16th (oldest). The single regex proves the whole contract end-to-end: the newest bullet's verbatim marker NEWESTVERBATIM is present (lookahead), the oldest bullet's narrative OLDNARRATIVE is ABSENT (negative lookahead — it was distilled away), and its distilled rule OLDRULE is present. Unit parity: test/lesson-compact.test.ts.

setup.content:
# LESSON.md — Lessons
<!-- format doc -->

- [2026-06-16 10:00] NEWESTVERBATIM recit recent garde entier alpha beta → regle recente zero
- [2026-06-15 10:00] filler distinct zorglub01 bidule01 machin01 → regle numero un

- [2026-06-07 10:00] filler distinct zorglub09 bidule09 machin09 → regle numero neuf

- [2026-06-04 10:00] filler distinct zorglub12 bidule12 machin12 → regle numero douze

- [2026-06-01 10:00] OLDNARRATIVE vieux recit verbeux doit disparaitre de l injection → OLDRULE distillee actionnable

steps.doc: SessionStart → stdout carries the compressed block: newest verbatim, oldest reduced to its rule (narrative dropped).
